studies.label: GETBAKED | CASE STUDY
studies.title: SCALING A CULT UK BAKERY BRAND
studies.description:
Want a masterclass in brand personality and community engagement? Look no further than GetBaked. 
In this role I led brand marketing, scaling a disruptive, content-first challenger brand through a bold social media strategy and development of a distinctive brand voice. Think buzz-generating collabs (L’Oreal, Fortnum & Mason), viral socials and store-openings with a bang.

studies.label: CROSSFADER | CASE STUDY
studies.title: GROWING A GLOBAL MUSIC COMMUNITY
studies.description:
In the rapidly growing electronic music industry Crossfader has a rare position as a loyalty brand. The goal here was to translate brand equity into new growth. 
I spearheaded the scaling of Crossfader’s education platform into a disruptive key leader in the dynamic electronic music, DJ and events industry. I strategised and created community engagement and growth-oriented social campaigns across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Discord and Threads that engaged new customers, diversified the brand proposition and drove commercial growth.
